name: rust
description: Rust programming language compiler (rustc), package manager (cargo), and toolchain installer (rustup).

installs.notes: Two-step flow: download rustup.sh script, show it to the user for confirmation, then run `sh /tmp/rustup.sh -y`.
Two-step flow: download rustup.sh script, verify it, then run `sh /tmp/rustup.sh -y`. A build toolchain like `build-essential` or `gcc` is a prerequisite.
Installs rustup. Requires Microsoft C++ Build Tools or Visual Studio to compile binary formulas.

commonFailures: Requires C compiler and linker. On Linux, run `sudo apt install build-essential`. On macOS, run `xcode-select --install`. On Windows, ensure Visual Studio Build Tools are installed.
PATH needs to include `~/.cargo/bin` (`%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin` on Windows). If not present after installation, restart the terminal or manually source it.
